metadata.description: docs-creator + component-creator plugins for Claude Code — documentation authoring and Figma-to-code component creation.

plugins.name: docs-creator
plugins.description: Authoring, validation, and drift-detection for .claude/ docs. Auto-emits version banner on every slash-command invocation via UserPromptSubmit hook. Ships analyze-frontend (icon_pattern + preprocessor-aware styling_patterns with 5-step detection: Preprocessor/Topology/Scope/Naming/Ingredients), create-frontend-docs (writes reference-icon-connection.md + reference-styling-flow.md), analyze-api-contracts, init-project, update-docs, validate-claude-docs, status, menu and more.

plugins.name: component-creator
plugins.description: Figma-to-code component creation with SSIM visual verification, Code Connect integration, and component registry. Auto-emits version banner on every slash-command invocation via UserPromptSubmit hook.
